block_01: We’d like to notify you about a recent change in the operation of our Practice accounts.
block_02: Starting today, all Practice trading positions open for longer than 9 hours shall be auto-closed. We believe this measure will still allow you to experience the full functionality of our trading instruments.
block_03: Please note: This measure applies to Practice Account positions only, you Real Account will not be affected.
block_04: We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
